query: How much have I spent on medical bills?
label: cold_P5.6
answer:
Hi Soham,
Your last cholesterol reading (April 5, 2026):

Total Cholesterol: 237 mg/dL (elevated)
LDL: 162 mg/dL (the "bad" cholesterol — high)
HDL: 38 mg/dL (the "good" cholesterol — low)
Triglycerides: 186 mg/dL (elevated)

These numbers suggest your cardiovascular risk is higher than ideal. Your doctor has referred you to a cardiologist, which is a good step.
Medical bills:
I can see one pharmacy invoice (March 2026) and one ER bill from November 2025 (CAD 249.27 for your wrist fracture). I don't have a complete record of all your costs across all providers and dates, so I can't give you a total figure.
For a full breakdown, you might want to check with your pharmacy and hospitals directly.
Not medical advice — talk to your doctor before acting on this.
